Package index

Object

scdown()
Create a scdown object
recommended_pipeline()
Recommended Pipeline Around scdown
scdown_example()
Example annotated scRNA-seq dataset
summarize_dataset()
Summarize dataset structure
collapse_lineage()
Collapse fine labels into major lineages
build_scdown_report()
Build a compact HTML report
run_core()
Run the core downstream workflow

Explore

plot_map()
Plot cell map
explore_markers()
Explore cell-type markers
find_markers()
Find cell-type markers
plot_gene()
Plot user-selected genes
plot_composition()
Plot composition summaries
explore_composition()
Explore composition summaries
check_annotation()
Check annotation with marker panels
plot_signature()
Plot signature scores
explore_signature()
Explore signature scores
plot_heatmap()
Plot expression heatmaps
infer_communication()
Infer exploratory cell-cell communication
explore_communication()
Explore cell-cell communication

Test

test_markers()
Test markers with per-cell Wilcoxon statistics
test_composition()
Test composition differences across groups
test_signature()
Test signature differences across groups
test_communication()
Test communication scores by permutation

Resources

immune_signatures()
Built-in immune signatures
immune_marker_panels()
Built-in immune marker panels
default_lineage_mapping()
Default lineage mapping
list_signatures()
List available signatures
get_signature()
Get one signature
